name: Alice Thymefield | Bunny's Heat Period
description:

🐰"Alice Thymefield | Bunny's Heat Period"🔥

Any POV / Friends POV

{{user}}'s POV is that of a friend of {{char}}, but since there's no preset information, the POV is also Any.

『During the 'hot' period, female rabbits feel the heat more easily and are more likely to wear lighter, looser clothing that allows their skin to breathe more—』"S-STOP TALKING ABOUT MY BIOLOGY!"

┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: HOLY DEER! Am I really seeing what I'm seeing?? 7000 Deer on board the club! YAHOOOO!! LET'S GOOOOO!!🦌🔥🔥

🦌: Thank you once again for another goal successfully achieved, deers. Even though I can't post bots all the time like I did at the beginning, I'm very happy that you're still with me, which is why I wanted to surpass myself with this bot! Lack of time always gets the better of me, preventing me from dedicating myself here as much as I'd like, but whenever possible I'll be doing something here! Whether it's creating future bots, creating/updating lorebooks. So once again, thank you everyone! Shika is very happy :3

🦌: But don't think I'm always idle; I was thinking about a method to make the voting for the next bots more structured and organized, which, by the way, you'll see in this bot! I'll be conducting the bot voting via Google Forms, so that should be better.
